LAW AND MOTION, 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISCHARGING PLAINTIFF-STAKEHOLDER WELLS FARGO FROM LIABILITY. NO APPEARANCES, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVANT MAY RENEW THE MOTION ONCE THE DEFENDANTS ANSWER OR ARE DEFAULTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING TO DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. DEPUTY: NOT PRESENT. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Discharging Plaintiff-Stakeholder Wells Fargo From Liability; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Order Discharging Plaintiff-Stakeholder Wells Fargo From Liability.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The motion is denied without prejudice. Movant may renew the motion once the defendants answer or are defaulted.

Counsel for the movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling to Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Deputy: Not Present. (302/RBU)
